root.rep_text: บัญชีแยกประเภท

account_id.text: ตั้งแต่บัญชี

root.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_id "เลขที่บัญชี", CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_general_ledger.dr_amount = 0 THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_general_ledger.dr_amount END "เดบิต", CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_general_ledger.cr_amount = 0 THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_general_ledger.cr_amount END "เครดิต", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.desc_journal_detail "รายละเอียด", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.doc_no "เลขเอกสาร", CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_general_ledger.dr_balance = 0 THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_general_ledger.dr_balance END "เดบิต คงเหลือ", CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_general_ledger.cr_balance = 0 THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_general_ledger.cr_balance END "เครดิต คงเหลือ", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.sequence_gl_no "ลำดับ", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.journal_date "วันที่", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.branch_id "สาขา", sc_acc_m_general_ledger.from_banch "หน่วย" ,
sc_acc_m_account_master.nature , sc_acc_m_general_ledger.acc_book_type_id,
CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_account_master.nature = 'DR' THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_account_master.begin_balance_temp END "เครดิต ยกมา" , CASE WHEN sc_acc_m_account_master.nature = 'CR' THEN null ELSE sc_acc_m_account_master.begin_balance_temp END "เดบิต ยกมา" ,
sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name "ชื่อบัญชี" FROM sc_acc_m_general_ledger, sc_acc_m_account_master , sc_com_m_branch WHERE ( sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_acc_m_general_ledger.branch_id ) and ( sc_acc_m_general_ledger.acc_book_type_id != 'CM' )
/*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_m_general_ledger.account_id , sc_acc_m_general_ledger.journal_date , sc_acc_m_general_ledger.branch_id, sc_acc_m_general_ledger.sequence_gl_no
